mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contract ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract ( file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, user_id, review_status, risk_level, review_score, created_at ) VALUES ( #{contract.fileName}, #{contract.filePath}, #{contract.fileSize}, #{contract.fileType}, #{contract.userId}, #{contract.reviewStatus}, #{contract.riskLevel}, #{contract.reviewScore}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'pending' OR review_status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as highRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mediumRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'LOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lowRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND (risk_level = 'NONE' OR risk_level IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noRisk, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND review_score IS NOT NULL THEN review_score END)) as avgScore, MAX(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' THEN review_score END) as maxScore, MIN(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND review_score IS NOT NULL THEN review_score END) as minScore FROM contract WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as highRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mediumRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND risk_level = 'LOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lowRisk, SUM(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND (risk_level = 'NONE' OR risk_level IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as noRisk, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND review_score IS NOT NULL THEN review_score END)) as avgScore, MAX(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' THEN review_score END) as maxScore, MIN(CASE WHEN review_status = 'completed' AND review_score IS NOT NULL THEN review_score END) as minScore FROM contract WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime}
SELECT file_name FROM contract WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE contract SET review_status = 'processing', risk_level = NULL, review_score = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
